text: A defendant may comply with a requirement to appear in court through an appearance by counsel.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1711 — Compliance with appearance

A defendant may comply with a requirement to appear in court through an appearance by counsel.

subsections.text: A defendant may comply with a requirement to appear in court through an appearance by counsel.
